nasb.text: Then Moses returned to the Lord and said, “O Lord, why have You brought harm to this people? Why did You ever send me?

esv.text: Then Moses turned to the Lord and said, “O Lord, why have you done evil to this people? Why did you ever send me?

cnv.text: 摩西回到耶和華那裡，說：“主啊！你為甚麼苦待這人民呢？為甚麼差派我呢？

ccb.text: 摩西回到耶和华那里说：“主啊！你为什么这样苦待你的子民呢？为什么要派我去呢？
